source: User-pasted Google Maps listing and menu for Holy City Brewing
notes: User asked to add Holy City Brewing as a place to review (not yet approved).
Full food menu (sharables, burgers, sammies, salads, sides, kids menu, seafare/raw bar, brunch specials) was pasted from the restaurant's website and analyzed.

location.description: Craft brewery featuring a garagelike tasting room with a pool table & live music, plus free tours.

menuHighlights: Sharables: pretzels, boiled peanuts, chips and dip, collision fries, brussel sprouts, mozzarella wedges, hummus, chicken nuggets, chicken wings
Burgers: Holy City Burger (pimento cheese, fried green tomato, bacon), Tomato Jam Burger, Classic Smash Burger
Sammies: grilled chicken club, fried chicken sandwich, chopped cheese, chopped turkey and ham sub
Salads: Holy City Salad, Burrata Salad
Sides: fries, house side salad; Kids menu: hot dog, grilled cheese, cheeseburger, nuggets
Seafare/raw bar: peel and eat shrimp, ceviche, smoked seafood dip, oysters, shrimp caesar salad, buffalo shrimp taco
Brunch specials: biscuits and gravy, chicken biscuits, shrimp and grits
